_doc: Strict per-mechanism budgets enforced by tools/ci/run_core_tests.sh. Override via env (see jit_bench.py / perf_gate.py / run_core_tests.sh). Bump deliberately — every loosening must be justified in HANDOFF. S78b: tightened to ~1.5x current actuals on the paddlejob shared-GPFS host.

cold_warmup_s._what: rm -rf cache; warmup_jit(force=True). End-to-end first-time compile + ptxas + autotune.

warm_sentinel_skip_s._what: Process restart with sentinel present; warmup_jit returns False without compiling.

cross_process_reload_s._what: Process restart with sentinel CLEARED but Triton+Quack disk caches PRESENT — must hit disk caches and avoid ptxas/autotune. CuTe still re-compiles in-process.

in_process_reuse_us._what: Same process, repeated fwd+bwd through SonicMoEMlpNode (full kernel work + paddle dispatch). Average over 5 iters after first cold-in-proc primes the in-memory CuTe cache. NOTE: this is end-to-end wall (paddle dispatch + python + kernel), NOT the pure GPU-projection — keep ~10% headroom over current actuals.

parallel_cold_s._what: rm -rf cache; warmup_jit_parallel(workers=2) over 4 total_K shapes. Validates that multi-process cold compile shares disk cache safely and finishes within budget.

coverage._what: sonicmoe package coverage gate from `coverage report --fail-under`. Bumped only with HANDOFF justification.
coverage._ratchet_plan: Default FP8 e4m3 path (cute_blockscaled_quant 83%, fused_quant_kernels 90%, gemm_gated 75%, gemm_dgated 51%, jit 73%) is well-covered. Alternate paths under-covered: blockscaled_fp8_gemm 22% (mxfp8), grouped_gemm 6%, swiglu_triton 11%, cute_dual_quant 20%, triton_blockscaled_gemm 18%, sgl_mxfp8_gemm 17%. Reaching 50% requires per-kernel integration tests for those non-default paths. Bump target_pct as each lands.

gpu_projection_us_per_iter._what: nsys GPU-projection µs/iter, FP8 fwd+bwd, canonical Ernie shape. S78 actual ~2740 µs on B200 SM 10.3.
